labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541511 ($192,866,921,104) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541511 ($305,260,086,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $292,242 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541511); class <5: 45,975 firms, avg revenue/firm $413,913 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $64,777 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 6,238 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,817,988 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $284,515 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 4,153 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,749,458 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $586,790 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 4,523 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,255,622 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,761,505 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 1,244 firms, avg revenue/firm $52,288,390 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $8,183,133 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 640 firms, avg revenue/firm $224,003,744 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $35,056,586 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 5,767
